MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority is present.
Attorney, Bill Ford, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Robert Hardy , is present.
Attorneys, Misti Groves and Devin McDonell, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-24-2010 is vacated.
